---
title: "StatiX AI & Data Labs"
description: "Learn practical, industry-aligned technical skills."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
title-block: false
---

::: {.hero}
# StatiX AI & Data Labs

Welcome — a curated collection of hands-on tutorials and guides for data, AI and programming.

Click any tile below to open the corresponding tutorial.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="tech-grid">
  <div class="tech-card">
    <a href="python.html">
      <span class="tech-status tech-status--soon">Coming soon</span>
      <div class="tech-logo"><i class="bi bi-filetype-py" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <div class="tech-name">Python</div>
      <span class="tech-open"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i> Open guide</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="tech-card">
    <a href="r.html">
      <span class="tech-status tech-status--soon">Coming soon</span>
      <div class="tech-logo"><i class="bi bi-r-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <div class="tech-name">R Programming</div>
      <span class="tech-open"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i> Open guide</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="tech-card">
    <a href="clinical-r.html">
      <span class="tech-status tech-status--soon">Coming soon</span>
      <div class="tech-logo"><i class="bi bi-heart-pulse" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <div class="tech-name">Clinical R</div>
      <span class="tech-open"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i> Open guide</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="tech-card">
    <a href="nextflow.html">
      <span class="tech-status tech-status--available">Available</span>
      <div class="tech-logo"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <div class="tech-name">Nextflow</div>
      <span class="tech-open"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i> Open guide</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="tech-card">
    <a href="docker.html">
      <span class="tech-status tech-status--available">Available</span>
      <div class="tech-logo"><i class="bi bi-box-seam" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <div class="tech-name">Docker</div>
      <span class="tech-open"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i> Open guide</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="tech-card">
    <a href="quarto_tutorial_for_beginners.html">
      <span class="tech-status tech-status--available">Available</span>
      <div class="tech-logo"><i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <div class="tech-name">Quarto</div>
      <span class="tech-open"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i> Open guide</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="tech-card">
    <a href="r-shiny.html">
      <span class="tech-status tech-status--soon">Coming soon</span>
      <div class="tech-logo"><i class="bi bi-window-stack" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <div class="tech-name">R Shiny</div>
      <span class="tech-open"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i> Open guide</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="tech-card">
    <a href="statistics.html">
      <span class="tech-status tech-status--soon">Coming soon</span>
      <div class="tech-logo"><i class="bi bi-calculator" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <div class="tech-name">Statistics</div>
      <span class="tech-open"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i> Open guide</span>
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="tech-card">
    <a href="ml-ai.html">
      <span class="tech-status tech-status--soon">Coming soon</span>
      <div class="tech-logo"><i class="bi bi-cpu" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <div class="tech-name">ML &amp; AI</div>
      <span class="tech-open"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i> Open guide</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
```

### About the collection

This site collects independent tutorials for clinical, pharmaceutical, and life-sciences teams. Each tile links to a standalone page with hands-on examples and runnable code.
